title: Conformance testing: Image configurations differ as committed in Docker format
body:
**Description**

Several conformance tests fail under Debian SID with Docker 23.0.1 - the version packaged for Debian 11 (bullseye).  Failing tests (using either VFS or overlay storage):

* `TestConformance/multistage-builtin-args`
* `TestConformance/workdir-owner`
* `TestConformance/env-precedence`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. On a Debian SID VM with buildah installed from source
2. Install Docker-CE 23.0.1-1~debian.12~bookworm
3. run `make test-conformance`


**Describe the results you received:**
([typical example log](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5611343332507648?logs=conformance_test#L413))

```
[+1306s]     conformance_test.go:470: 
[+1306s]         	Error Trace:	/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/conformance_test.go:470
[+1306s]         	            				/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/conformance_test.go:331
[+1306s]         	            				/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/conformance_test.go:149
[+1306s]         	Error:      	Image configurations differ as committed in Docker format
[+1306s]         	Test:       	TestConformance/workdir-owner
[+1306s]         	Messages:   	Fields missing from buildah version: moby.buildkit.buildinfo.v1
[+1306s]         	            	Fields which only exist in buildah version: config:AttachStderr config:Entrypoint config:Volumes config:StdinOnce config:Labels config:AttachStdout config:Tty config:OpenStdin config:Domainname config:AttachStdin container_config parent
[+1306s]     conformance_test.go:365: Dockerfile contents:
[+1306s]         FROM alpine
[+1306s]         USER daemon
[+1306s]         WORKDIR /created/directory
[+1306s]         RUN ls /created
[+1306s]         (no final end-of-line)
[+1306s] === RUN   TestConformance/env-precedence
[+1312s]     conformance_test.go:470: 
[+1312s]         	Error Trace:	/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/conformance_test.go:470
[+1312s]         	            				/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/conformance_test.go:331
[+1312s]         	            				/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/conformance_test.go:149
[+1312s]         	Error:      	Image configurations differ as committed in Docker format
[+1312s]         	Test:       	TestConformance/env-precedence
[+1312s]         	Messages:   	Fields missing from buildah version: moby.buildkit.buildinfo.v1
[+1312s]         	            	Fields which only exist in buildah version: config:Labels config:AttachStdin config:AttachStderr config:Tty config:Volumes config:Domainname config:User config:OpenStdin config:StdinOnce config:Entrypoint config:AttachStdout config:WorkingDir container_config parent
[+1312s]     conformance_test.go:353: Context "/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/conformance/testdata/env/precedence"
[+1312s]     conformance_test.go:365: Dockerfile contents:
[+1312s]         FROM busybox
[+1312s]         ENV a=b
[+1312s]         ENV c=d
[+1312s]         RUN echo E=$E G=$G
[+1312s]         ENV E=E G=G
[+1312s]         RUN echo E=$E G=$G
[+1313s] --- FAIL: TestConformance (1051.79s)
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Conformance tests should all pass

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

Compiled from source

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.30.0-dev
Go Version:      go1.19.6
Image Spec:      1.0.2-dev
Runtime Spec:    1.1.0-rc.1
CNI Spec:        1.0.0
libcni Version:  v1.1.2
image Version:   5.24.3-dev
Git Commit:      3f215f9b02a084aefa7e30538bc605a69e91138f
Built:           Thu Mar  2 15:47:55 2023
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

N/A

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
PRETTY_NAME="Debian GNU/Linux bookworm/sid"
NAME="Debian GNU/Linux"
VERSION_CODENAME=bookworm
ID=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.debian.org/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://www.debian.org/support"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.debian.org/"
VERSION_ID="12.03"
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux cevich-debian-c20230221t162829z-f37f36d12 6.1.0-5-cloud-amd64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Debian 6.1.12-1 (2023-02-15) x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
<file doesn't exist>
```

comments.body: ***Note***: A commit in #4610 disables these affected tests.
